title: Verify targeting logic for the Trial Corner cohort
description: Tests that the Trial Corner feature is only assigned to users who do NOT start content consumption within the first 5 minutes of activating their trial.
preconditions: Two test users (User A, User B) have just activated a trial.

steps.description: 1. With User A, start playing any content within 2 minutes of trial activation.
2. With User B, do not play any content for at least 6 minutes after trial activation.
3. For both users, navigate to the homepage and check for the 'Trial Mode' widget.
4. For both users, navigate to the 'Manage Trial' section in their profile.

expected_result: User A (consumed content early) should NOT see the 'Trial Mode' widget or the new Trial Corner flow. User B (did not consume content) SHOULD see the 'Trial Mode' widget and be directed to the Trial Corner.
